content.en:
Ye Tian paid one hundred yuan of Dao blood gold, and naturally obtained this place.

And Taisu Palace will not trace the origin of the Dao Blood Gold, as long as they give them the materials they need, it will be fine, and the others will not be asked.

......

Soon, the Great Array of Approaches opened.

Rumble!!!!!

The entire Taixuan Ancient Capital seemed to be enveloped in the endless power of the Supreme Dao Rules, and the prison that enveloped the Reincarnation Domain and the Eternal Beyond Land was not worth mentioning at all compared to this Great Array of Guiding Dao.

Of course, the prison itself was only created to absorb the origin of the origin realm, and it was not a large array that was too powerful, and the roles of the two sides were different.

And the price paid by Taisu Palace to build this Guiding Array is absolutely unimaginable, far from being comparable to a mere prison.

Bang!!!!

The Guiding Dao Array was completely opened, and the Supreme Dao Realm that had obtained the quota passed through the passage one by one and entered the Guiding Dao Great Array.

During this period, all the Supreme Dao Realms were very honest, and those Supreme Dao Realms who did not obtain quotas only dared to watch silently in the Taixuan Ancient Capital, and did not dare to trespass at all.

In an incomparably long ago, there was indeed a Dao realm that thought he was powerful but unruly, and wanted to forcibly enter the Great Array of Guiding Dao, but was directly killed by the strong men of Taisu Palace.

Therefore, since then, no Dao Realm has dared to die like this.

......

Inside the Great Array of the Guiding Dao, there is a void world, and here is another platform.

Ye Tian sat here cross-legged, vaguely sensing other supreme realms, but they were in different heaven and earth time and space, and they would not interfere with each other.

Soon.

The Great Array of Guiding Dao was completely closed, and all the Supreme Dao Realms that entered here silently became enlightened.

Ye Tian also began to comprehend the rules of the Supreme Dao, and his other replica bodies also began to comprehend at the same time, cooperating with the Dongguang replicating body to comprehend together.

After all, Dongguang's talent for copying the body is not good, and his comprehension is not very good, if he relies on this copying body to comprehend the rules of the Dao, he will definitely not gain anything.

And the comprehension of the real body replicating the body is very high, so it is natural to participate in the enlightenment together.

Airplanes!!!!

It was as if the endless Supreme Dao Rules were slowly flowing through his will, making him feel the more powerful Supreme Dao Rules.

At this moment, Ye Tiancai knew that the Supreme Dao rules he had realized were really weak, and even among the powerhouses of the First Supreme Dao Realm, they were average.

This is also no way, those one-level supreme realm in the infinite realm to comprehend the supreme path rules, the environment is much better, and he has consulted countless years, and where in the origin realm how many opportunities does he have to comprehend the supreme dao rules!

If it weren't for the fragments of the Forbidden Dao Great Array, he wouldn't have been able to comprehend the rules of the Dao so far.

"The Supreme Dao rules contained in the fragments of the prison are too broken and too weak, this is the real Supreme Dao rules!"

Ye Tian was extremely excited, and gradually immersed in it.

At this moment, he is like a newborn doll, very curious about everything, absorbing the knowledge of the outside world step by step, and gradually growing up.

Compared to the other Supreme Dao realms here, Ye Tian's comprehension is too terrifying, and with the fact that many copy bodies are contemplating it together, the effect will obviously be better.

At this time.

Ye Tian is perfecting and making up for his own supreme rules step by step, so as to move towards perfection.

And the more he comprehended the Supreme Dao Rules, the more he realized the majesty and power of the Supreme Dao Rules, and even the Supreme Dao Rules displayed in the Great Array of the Guiding Dao were only a small part of the complete Supreme Dao Rules.

The Great Array of Guiding Dao will last for five thousand to Dao years, and there is still plenty of time.

After all, many Supreme Dao Realm comprehension talents are not good, if the time is too short, they are afraid that they will not be able to comprehend anything, and pay such a big price, if they do not improve the Supreme Dao rules by much, it will be too much of a loss.

You must know that many forces have to pay a heavy price to be able to let a Supreme Dao Realm come over and use the Guiding Dao Great Array!

Taisu Palace will not give very little time to contemplation, otherwise who will collect all kinds of precious materials for Taisu Palace in the future?

One Solstice Dao year after another has passed, and Ye Tian's Solstice Dao rules have progressed rapidly.

One hundred to the year of the Tao!

Two hundred to the year of the Tao!

Three hundred to the year of the Tao!

And when the Supreme Dao rules were greatly improved, Ye Tian's true body copy body cultivation was also rapidly improving, and with the help of those resources, he gradually reached the late stage of the eighth balance, and the distance to the limit was getting closer and closer.

Five thousand to the years of the Dao years.

Such a long time is also a long time for Ye Tian.

But for the powerhouses of the Supreme Dao Realm, five thousand Dao years is not a long time, it is just a retreat.

Rumble!!!

The Great Array of Leads began to shake, and it was about to move them out.

"Ah, the five thousand years of the Dao have passed so quickly, and I still want to enlighten for a while!"

"The bottleneck of my Supreme Dao rules is about to be broken, give me a few hundred more Supreme Dao years!"

"Hey, time flies too fast, I can only find a way to get some more materials in exchange for a place to participate in enlightenment!"

Ye Tian, like other Supreme Dao realms, was also a little reluctant, the efficiency of comprehending the Supreme Dao rules here was really too fast, the progress of the Supreme Dao rules was too fast, and his strength would also improve a lot.

Once you leave the Approach Array, it will be impossible to make such rapid progress.

Buzz Buzz !!!

A Rank to the Dao Realm has been moved, and Ye Tian is no exception.

As soon as he came out, Ye Tian exuded a powerful Supreme Dao Rule aura all over his body, attracting a lot of attention from the Supreme Dao Realm, but he quickly converged on the Dao Rule aura and quickly left here.

Of course, the other Supreme Dao realms didn't care about Ye Tian either.

......

"My Supreme Dao rule aura has improved too much, and when I use those divine powers, my power has been greatly increased, with my current Supreme Dao rule attainments, plus those Supreme Dao secret texts in the True River Valley, try some years, maybe I hope to create a Supreme Dao Divine Power!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The other Dao realms didn't dare to try indiscriminately, and their own background was not good, and there was no clone for them to come indiscriminately, but he could come indiscriminately!

He felt that there was still a great possibility for him to create a supreme supernatural power.

"However, let's first upgrade the cultivation of the True Body Replication Body to the ninth balance, once the True Body Replication Body cultivation breaks through, it will definitely be comparable to the combat power of the Second Dao Realm!" Ye Tian said confidently.

Ruin Collar.

Ye Tian's True Body Replica Body Cultivation had reached the limit of the eighth balance, and he was ready to start attacking the ninth balance.

In order to break through, he was going to refine some incomparably precious resources for the true body to copy the body, and there were also several secret medicines in the True River Valley that could help break through, all of which were secret medicines at the level of the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm, and they also had a little effect.

For this breakthrough, he is ready to spend a few more times, even if he can't break through once, then several times.

He didn't believe that the true body copied the body, and he couldn't raise his cultivation to the ninth balance realm.
